subject: Adding JSON Schema support in APEX-PDP
commit_message:
Adding JSON Schema support in APEX-PDP

More details can be found here:
https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/JSON+Schema+support+in+APEX-PDP

A separate review will be raised as part of POLICY-4292 with a reference
example on how to use the JSON Schema.

Change-Id: I903d48969c6c5a24c63b8465b2412ed0b75b9351
Issue-ID: POLICY-4291
Signed-off-by: a.sreekumar <ajith.sreekumar@bell.ca>
(cherry picked from commit c354fba3fb87ebe21a7fbb2a15268ccc9d033fbd)

Patch Set 2:

Hey Ram, I missed this in Ajith's previous review in master but we there a StandarValCoder which is a StandardCoder but with support of json schema validation using this same underlying library, with the difference that is integrated into policy/common and can be used interchangeably with the StandardCoder.   It is what is used in drools for schema validation of policies.   I think in these istanbul, etc ..is OK to have it as you have it but in master branch, there should be some work provided that the library is used in apex, common, and droos to bring the version to policy/parent for commonality, and if at all possible use the StandardValCode in apex.   What do you think? 

For reference:
https://git.onap.org/policy/common/tree/utils/src/main/java/org/onap/policy/common/utils/coder/StandardValCoder.java
https://git.onap.org/policy/common/tree/utils/src/test/java/org/onap/policy/common/utils/coder/StandardValCoderTest.java

Patch Set 2:

> 
> Hey Ram, I missed this in Ajith's previous review in master but we there a StandarValCoder which is a StandardCoder but with support of json schema validation using this same underlying library, with the difference that is integrated into policy/common and can be used interchangeably with the StandardCoder.   It is what is used in drools for schema validation of policies.   I think in these istanbul, etc ..is OK to have it as you have it but in master branch, there should be some work provided that the library is used in apex, common, and droos to bring the version to policy/parent for commonality, and if at all possible use the StandardValCode in apex.   What do you think? 
> 
> For reference:
> https://git.onap.org/policy/common/tree/utils/src/main/java/org/onap/policy/common/utils/coder/StandardValCoder.java
> https://git.onap.org/policy/common/tree/utils/src/test/java/org/onap/policy/common/utils/coder/StandardValCoderTest.java

Hi Jorge,
Agree with you, in-fact we already did it in master branch, the version of associated library is managed by policy/parent. Please take a look at this review - 
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/policy/parent/+/130007

I will raise another review to take out version from policy/common pom.xml and let it derive from policy/parent instead. Hope that helps!

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Yes, thank you Ram.
Change has been successfully merged by Ram Krishna Verma
